allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); r=d['results'][0]; print\('keys:', sorted\(r.keys\(\)\)[:20]\); print\('version:', r.get\('version'\)\); print\('releaseDate:', r.get\('currentVersionReleaseDate'\)\); print\('trackName:', r.get\('trackName'\)\); print\('releaseNotes preview:', \(r.get\('releaseNotes'\) or ''\)[:200]\)")
